title: Did you know that Eva pilots are psychic
display_title: Did you know that Eva pilots are psychic
wikitext:
[]: Did you know that Eva pilots are psychic??             Quote Post by Dimmi » Mon Jul 31, 2006 5:24 am I was reading the Evangelion perfect collection product description on Amazon when I came across this gem :P "Only teenagers with special psychic powers can pilot the Evas" I love how it implies that the pilots are spoon-bending telepathics

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 31, 2006 5:28 am Heh. Psychics. They're so stupid. We ALLLL know Gendo is in fact Yoda and that the three pilots are just strong in The Force.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Jul 31, 2006 7:45 am Yeah, and good ol' Keel is Palpatine... But the great Darth Vader is not there... :( My favourite... :(

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Mon Jul 31, 2006 7:55 am FauÃŸtin wrote: Yeah, and good ol' Keel is Palpatine... But the great Darth Vader is not there... :( My favourite... :(

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 31, 2006 8:09 am Dr. Strangelove wrote: FauÃŸtin wrote: Yeah, and good ol' Keel is Palpatine... But the great Darth Vader is not there... :( My favourite... :(

[]: Re: Did you know that Eva pilots are psychic??             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Mon Jul 31, 2006 1:26 pm Actually, how do they find the eva pilots?

[]:             Quote Post by Dimmi » Mon Jul 31, 2006 1:29 pm I always thought it was a special organisation called the Marduk committee or something...they're pretty mysterious! I guess they must have run tests at NERV branches around the world for children of a certain age group, or children of their employees or something.... .....but that's just my speculation and I haven't studied the series enough to be able to make assumptions about it! so if I'm wrong please correct me hehehe :)

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Mon Jul 31, 2006 1:43 pm I know about Marduk, but how do they find them? I don't remember Shinji ever taking a sync test.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 31, 2006 2:01 pm Every 'Child' has\had a mom working in NERV. Except for Rei. They're moms get Contact Expirements and wham, you're a Child. I'd rather not pilot EVA if it means giving up on Legend-no-Oka-san.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Mon Jul 31, 2006 2:37 pm So toji's mom had a contact experiment?

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Mon Jul 31, 2006 2:44 pm ZeroFive1 wrote: So toji's mom had a contact experiment?

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Jul 31, 2006 3:08 pm right-o! we know nothing about toji's mother, he was just one choice from all Shinji's classmates IIRC

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jul 31, 2006 3:08 pm Well we know that both Kensuke and Toujis fathers work at NERV

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Jul 31, 2006 3:13 pm I didn't remember about toji's father, do we know his position?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jul 31, 2006 3:17 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: I didn't remember about toji's father, do we know his position?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 31, 2006 3:51 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: Well we know that both Kensuke and Toujis fathers work at NERV

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Jul 31, 2006 10:38 pm Did you know that Eva pilots are psychic??
